title: Statistics for Linguistics Network
text:
The aim of the Statistics for Linguistics Network is to bring together researchers and students in linguistics with an interest in developing and/or disseminating statistical theories and practices in linguistic research.
Check the members list here.

title: Statistics for Linguistics
text:
GitHub Organisation
All communication will happen through the GitHub Organisation Discussions S4NL, available to members.

title: Statistics for Linguistics Network
text:
Join us!
To join the network, please fill in this form.
By submitting this form you agree to your name, institution, linguistics specialisation and statistics experience/expertise being publicly listed on the S4L Network members list. Your email will not be shared.
For more info, get in touch with Stefano Coretta at s.coretta at ed.ac.uk.
